description: A version, release, or revision of a software component, document, or artifact

release_date.description: Date when the version was released or published (ISO 8601 format)

changes.description: List of notable changes, additions, fixes, or deprecations in this version

compatibility.description: Other versions or systems with which this version is compatible

status.description: Release maturity (e.g., alpha, beta, release-candidate, stable, deprecated)
